summary: Backend-only testing of order email notification wiring. All 19 tests passed. Verified: send_order_notification_emails is correctly imported and called in verify_payment, ORDER_NOTIFICATION_EMAILS contains ['mail@locofast.com', 'mohit@locofast.com'], supplier email does NOT contain customer phone, admin email DOES contain customer phone, supplier email contains product URLs and order type badges, admin email shows full financial breakdown.
passed_tests: Supplier email does NOT contain customer phone number (+91-9876543210)
Supplier email shows order type badges (Bulk/Sample)
Supplier email shows rate, quantity, and order value
Admin email DOES contain customer phone number
Admin email contains ALL customer info (name, email, phone, company, address, city, state, pincode)
Admin email shows subtotal, GST, discount, and total breakdown
Admin email shows order items with details
Supplier email has proper HTML structure
Admin email has proper HTML structure
critical_code_review_comments: orders_router.py line 21: from email_router import send_order_notification_emails - correctly imported
orders_router.py lines 339-344: send_order_notification_emails called after payment verification in verify_payment endpoint
get_seller_order_notification_email (line 276): Correctly excludes customer phone from 'Ship To' section (only shows email)
get_order_received_admin_email (line 179): Correctly includes customer phone in 'Customer Details' section
Supplier email template includes: product URLs (SITE_URL/fabrics/{fabric_id}), order type badges (Bulk/Sample), rate/quantity/order value, payment status, dispatch info
Admin email template includes: full customer info with phone, subtotal/GST/discount/total breakdown, order items with types
seed_data_creation: Test order created via /api/orders/create (order_number generated dynamically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order email notification wiring fully tested and working. When payment is verified via POST /api/orders/verify-payment, send_order_notification_emails is called which sends: 1) Customer confirmation email, 2) Admin notification to mail@locofast.com and mohit@locofast.com (with full customer info including phone), 3) Supplier notification (without customer phone, but with product URLs, order type badges, rate/quantity/value, payment status, dispatch info). Razorpay is configured with live keys (rzp_live_8Gol9U27RLRH2C). Resend API is configured for email sending.
